_readme: WHAT THIS IS: Seed data for the portfolio database. Fill in real values before running T4.1. HOW TO USE: The tools/seed binary reads this file and inserts into SQLite. Run from repo root: `cargo run --manifest-path tools/seed/Cargo.toml`. All fields marked FILL_IN must be replaced with real content — the seed binary will fail if it finds that string.

portfolio.name: Richard Lao
portfolio.bio: FILL_IN: 2-3 sentence bio from CV. e.g. Software engineer focused on systems, distributed infra, and product. Founder of Serac Tech.
portfolio.summary: FILL_IN: One-liner used in the hero section. e.g. 'Building systems that scale — and products people use.'

experiences.company: FILL_IN: earlier company or university project

projects.title: PharmaBridge
projects.writeup: FILL_IN: 2-4 sentence project description. What problem it solved, what tech, what outcome.

projects.title: MARL Dissertation
projects.writeup: FILL_IN: 2-4 sentence description of the multi-agent reinforcement learning dissertation. Topic, approach, findings.

qa_pairs.prompt: What are you working on right now?
qa_pairs.answer: FILL_IN: current focus, e.g. building Serac Tech's core infra and this portfolio app.
FILL_IN: e.g. Systems programming and distributed infra — I'm most at home in Rust or Go, designing for reliability.
FILL_IN: 2-3 sentence answer about the project. What it is, what you built, what impact it had.

qa_pairs.prompt: What's your approach to software architecture?
qa_pairs.answer: FILL_IN: your genuine view on architecture, e.g. start boring, add complexity only when forced by scale.
FILL_IN: genuine answer about what excites you about Lapse specifically.

qa_pairs.prompt: What would you build differently if you had more time?
qa_pairs.answer: FILL_IN: honest answer — shows self-awareness. e.g. I'd add real auth, write more integration tests, flesh out the Android extension point.

conversations.participant_name: FILL_IN: fictional recruiter name, e.g. Alex
conversations.last_message: FILL_IN: last message preview, e.g. 'Sounds great, let's set up a call.'

messages.body: FILL_IN: opening message, e.g. 'Hi Richard, I came across your work on PharmaBridge — really impressive. Would love to connect.'
FILL_IN: Richard's reply, e.g. 'Thanks Alex! Happy to chat — what team are you hiring for?'
FILL_IN: follow-up, e.g. 'Sounds great, let's set up a call.'

conversations.last_message: FILL_IN: e.g. 'We'd love to have you join the platform team.'

messages.body: FILL_IN: e.g. 'We'd love to have you join the platform team.'

conversations.last_message: FILL_IN: e.g. 'The MARL work is exactly the kind of applied research we value.'
